name: Angel Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine egg whites, cream of tartar, and salt in a large bowl. Beat to very soft peaks.
2. Gradually add sugar 1 teaspoon at a time on the lowest speed of the mixer, beating until stiff peaks form.
3. Slowly add sifted cake flour on the lowest speed of the mixer, beating until no streaks remain.
4. Gently fold in vanilla extract, almond extract, and lemon juice with a spatula until well incorporated.
5. Transfer batter to a nonstick angel food cake pan that has been greased or coated with release spray.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 45-50 minutes, or until the cake is golden brown on top and the cracks feel dry when touched.
7. Invert the pan and let cool completely before removing the cake onto a serving platter.
TO MAKE CHOCOLATE ANGEL FOOD CAKE:
Leave out the lemon juice and add 1/2 cup unsweetened cocoa powder to the batter before folding in the vanilla, almond extract, and lemon juice.
